channel.title: Connectors on OWASP Coraza
channel.description: Recent content in Connectors on OWASP Coraza

item.title: HAProxy Coraza SPOA
item.description: Coraza SPOA is a system daemon which brings the Coraza Web Application Firewall (WAF) as a backing service for HAProxy. It is written in Go, Coraza supports ModSecurity SecLang rulesets and is 100% compatible with the OWASP Core Rule Set v4.

item.title: Apache APISIX
item.description: Web Application Firewall WASM filter built on top of Coraza and implementing the proxy-wasm ABI. It can be loaded directly from Envoy or also used as an Istio plugin.

item.title: Envoy
item.description: A Web Application Firewall (WAF) HTTP filter plugin for Envoy that leverages the Coraza WAF engine to provide layer 7 security for web applications.

item.title: libcoraza (C Library)
item.description: Welcome to libcoraza, the C library for OWASP Coraza Web Application Firewall. Because Coraza was made in golang, if you want to embed in any kind of C application, you will need this library.

item.title: NGINX
item.description:
Coraza NGINX Connector

The coraza-nginx connector is the connection point between nginx and libcoraza. The module simply serves as a layer of communication between nginx and Coraza.

item.title: Proxy-Wasm (Envoy/Istio)
item.description: Web Application Firewall WASM filter built on top of Coraza and implementing the proxy-wasm ABI. It can be loaded directly from Envoy or also used as an Istio plugin.

item.title: Traefik
item.description: DISCLAIMER: This project is still in early stages and it can be used to get a grasp on the Coraza + Traefik integration over Wasm. If you are looking for production grade performance I recommend you look into Coraza native integration with Traefik

item.title: Caddy
item.description:
OWASP Coraza Caddy Module provides Web Application Firewall capabilities for Caddy.

OWASP Coraza WAF is 100% compatible with OWASP Coreruleset and Modsecurity syntax.
